headline: Assessing Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Valuation As Growth Portfolio Drives Revenue And Earnings Reset
summary: Why Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) is on investors’ radar today Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) continues to attract attention as a large US biopharmaceutical group with exposure to oncology, hematology and immunology, and a track record of selling complex therapies worldwide. See our latest analysis for Bristol-Myers Squibb. Bristol-Myers Squibb’s share price, now at US$60.63, has a 90 day share price return of 19.7% and a year to date share price return of 13.4%.
